column1:
Define a function to group a set of statements for reuse in a program.  
Call a function to execute its predefined set of operations.  
Return a value from a function to provide a result back to the caller.  
Specify parameters in a function definition to accept inputs and influence function behavior.  
Use hierarchical function calls by invoking functions within other functions to build complex operations.
